source: User-pasted Google Maps search results for Jersey Mike's Subs locations across the Charleston metro area.
note: Jersey Mike's Subs was previously removed from this project at user request, then re-added per explicit new user request ('Add jersey mike's to check out') as its own distinct locations, not merged as a single chain entry.
